stories.title: Sam Burns Leads the 154th Open at -10 — Final Round at Royal Birkdale

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Sam Burns leads the 154th Open Championship at -10.

He's 2 shots clear. He's at Royal Birkdale. And his daughter was born 2 days ago.

From the delivery room to the Claret Jug — final round today.

#TheOpen #OpenChampionship

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Final round entering Sunday at Birkdale:

-10: Sam Burns 🇺🇸
-8: Ryan Fox 🇳🇿 | Si Woo Kim 🇰🇷
-7: Lucas Herbert 🇦🇺
-6: Bryson DeChambeau 🇺🇸

The Claret Jug is on the line. Who lifts it?

#TheOpen #OpenChampionship

article.headline: Sam Burns Leads the 154th Open at -10: From the Delivery Room to the Claret Jug

stories.title: Ryan Fox Shoots Historic 62 in R3 — Becomes 8th Golfer Ever in a Major

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Ryan Fox shot 62 in Round 3 at Royal Birkdale.

That makes him the 8th golfer ever to shoot 62 in a major — and the 3rd player to do it at THIS Open alone.

From even par to T2 at -8. One round.

#TheOpen #OpenChampionship #RyanFox

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Three 62s at one Open Championship.

Ryan Fox joined Lucas Herbert and Sam Burns in shooting 62 at Birkdale — the 8th golfer ever to reach that score in a major.

History is being made on the Lancashire coast. 🏆

#TheOpen #OpenChampionship

article.headline: Ryan Fox Shoots 62 in Round 3 — Becomes 8th Player in History to Reach the Major Scoring Limit

stories.title: McIlroy Rips DeChambeau: "Performative... Not Particularly Fond of Him"

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Rory McIlroy on Bryson DeChambeau's penalty reaction at The Open:

"I'm not particularly fond of him. I think a lot of it's performative. I think a lot of it's for attention."

That's not a vague hint. That's a statement.

#TheOpen #OpenChampionship

article.headline: "Not Particularly Fond of Him": McIlroy's Scorched-Earth Assessment of DeChambeau

stories.title: Fleetwood Hometown Hope — Southport's Son at -5 Entering Final Round

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Tommy Fleetwood is from Southport — 6 miles from Royal Birkdale.

He grew up sneaking onto this course as a kid. His dad is caddying this week.

He's -5, five shots back. The dream is still alive.

#TheOpen #OpenChampionship #Fleetwood

article.headline: The Hometown Dream: Tommy Fleetwood at Royal Birkdale, Six Miles from Home

stories.title: LIV Golf Funding Crisis — Saudi PIF Ending Backing After 2026

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund is ending financial backing of LIV Golf after the 2026 season.

LIV has 4 events left this year. The 2027 future is "still up in the air."

The tour is searching for new investors.

#LIVGolf #Golf #OpenChampionship

article.headline: LIV Golf's Funding Is Ending. Its Players Are Winning at The Open.
